_note: Jonah pericope → verse-range map (SC-0032; the held-out generality test). start/end are HEBREW versification (BHSA-native); bcv is English. NOTE bhsa_book is the ETCBC BHSA Latin book name 'Jona' (NOT 'Jonah') — verified against the tf/2021 `book` feature in Phase 1 (SC-0033); Ruth was identical in Latin/English so SC-0032 didn't surface this. Jonah's Heb/Eng numbering diverges at the fish: English 1:17 = Hebrew 2:1, so English 2:1-10 = Hebrew 2:2-11. Run via: extract_bhsa.py J01 --pericopes extractor/pericopes.jonah.json. J01 (1:1-3) is the firm pilot; J02-J05 are PROVISIONAL — boundaries (esp. the psalm) are Marcia's authoring-time ruling, and the Heb ranges are verified at extraction (Phase 1).
